prompt: I never want Claude to be able to push directly to the main or master branch. Can you set something up to block that automatically? I don't want to have to remember to tell Claude — it should just be enforced.
assertions: Chooses a hook (not a skill) because the user wants automatic enforcement
Chooses PreToolUse event (not PostToolUse) because it must block before execution
Provides a shell script that checks git push commands for main/master patterns
Uses non-zero exit (exit 1 or exit 2) to block the tool call
Includes exit 0 for non-matching commands to avoid accidental blocking
